  "findings": [
    "Missing bonding jumper around the water meter, creating a potential shock hazard and interrupting the electrical grounding path."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install a properly sized copper bonding jumper around the water meter using approved ground clamps in accordance with NEC 250.104."
  ],
  "rationale": "NEC 250.104(A)(1) requires metal water piping systems to be bonded. When a water meter is installed, it can be removed for service or may contain non-conductive parts, which interrupts the grounding path. A bonding jumper must be installed around the meter to ensure electrical continuity.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 250.104",
    "NEC 250.30"
  ]
}
